title: Spirit People in Ngabaya Spirit People
australian_relation: ABC Education public media resource presenting the Ngabaya Spirit People story from the Wurdaliya clan of the Yanyuwa people.
evidence_summary: ABC Education's public Ngabaya: Spirit People resource presents a transcript in which Wanjarrarra is described as a small island where there were many Spirit People. The story names one old Spirit Man as their leader, says he told the other Spirit People to return south to Liwarrinya, and says the Spirit People later heard other Spirit People calling from Sandy Head.
